1.0.1.en: Made startup more stable, show error if account not connected

1.0.2.en: Add option to enable diagnostic logging

1.0.3.en: Fixed volume control for certain devices

1.0.4.en: Added extended logging, better connection handling, fix pairing view

1.0.5.en: Fix Echo Show devices not showing up, fix server not found for certain regions, updated device icons

1.0.6.en: Support more languages, fix album art refresh

1.0.7.en: Show model number in settings, improve re-auth, update dependencies

1.1.1.en: Add option to fully reset app

1.1.2.en: Updated underlying library for latest API changes

1.1.3.en: Update dependencies for amazon api changes

1.2.0.en: Better reconnection handling and properly stop proxy server on reset

1.3.0.en: Changed reconnection handling to be more resilient

1.3.1.en: Improved connection handling on restart and lost connections

1.3.2.en: Correctly show amazon.com.br and amazon.com.mx in settings

2.0.0.en: Major update: rebuilt the app with python and use a new authentication library to hopefully resolve connection issues. Requires Homey firmware v13 or newer. One-time action: open the app settings and sign in again with your email, password and authenticator (2-step) code — your region is now detected automatically. New: 'Say with Voice' flow action with Amazon Polly voices, plus improved whisper. If you used the 'Run Routine' flow card, please re-select your routine.

2.0.1.en: Major update: the app has been rebuilt in Python with a new authentication library to fix the recurring connection drops. Requires Homey firmware v13 or newer. One-time action: open the app settings and sign in again with your email, password and authenticator (2-step) code — your region is now detected automatically. New: 'Say with Voice' flow action with Amazon Polly voices, plus improved whisper. If you used the 'Run Routine' flow card, please re-select your routine. Also fixes adding devices, playback controls and now-playing updates.

2.0.2.en: Major update: the app has been rebuilt in Python with a new authentication library to fix the recurring connection drops. Requires Homey firmware v13 or newer. One-time action: open the app settings and sign in again with your email, password and authenticator (2-step) code — your region is now detected automatically. New: 'Say with Voice' flow action with Amazon Polly voices, plus improved whisper. If you used the 'Run Routine' flow card, please re-select your routine. Also fixes adding devices, playback controls and now-playing updates.

2.0.3.en: More reliable sign-in: if Amazon returns an unexpected page instead of the code prompt, the app now retries automatically. Added an optional 'diagnostic logging' switch in app settings — if you have trouble signing in or connecting, turn it on, reproduce the problem, then send a diagnostic report so the cause can be pinpointed. Also updated the Amazon library to the latest version, which fixes playback (play/pause/next/previous) controls.

2.0.4.en: Major reliability update for signing in and adding devices. Fixed sign-in failing with 'Cannot find account owner customer ID' (which affected accounts that had signed in several times), and fixed 'Add device' timing out while searching — adding devices, and loading them at sign-in, is now much faster. Sign-in is also saved as soon as your account is registered so a brief Amazon hiccup no longer makes you start over, the app retries automatically if Amazon returns an unexpected page, and error messages are clearer. New: an optional 'diagnostic logging' switch in app settings to help pin down connection problems. Also updated the underlying Amazon library, which fixes playback (play/pause/next/previous) controls.
